description_wiki: The Philippines, officially the Republic of the Philippines, is an archipelagic country in Southeast Asia.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: city of the Philippines in Metro Manila
description_wiki: Quezon City (UK: , US: ; Filipino: Lungsod Quezon [luŋˈsod ˈkɛson] ), also known as the City of Quezon and Q.C. (read and pronounced in Filipino as Kyusi), is the most populous city in the Philippines.

aliases: Queen City of the Pacific and others
description_wiki: Manila, officially the City of Manila, is the capital and second-most populous city of the Philippines after Quezon City.

aliases: An Act to amend the Immigration and Nationality Act
Immigration and Nationality Act Amendments of 1965
The Immigration and Nationality Services Act of 1965
description_wiki: The Immigration and Nationality Act of 1965, also known as the Hart–Celler Act and more recently as the 1965 Immigration Act, was a federal law passed by the 89th United States Congress and signed into law by President Lyndon B. Johnson.

description: city in and county seat of Honolulu County, Hawaii, United States, that is also the capital city of Hawaii
description_wiki: Honolulu (  HON-ə-LOO-loo; Hawaiian: [honoˈlulu]) is the capital and most populous city of the U.S. state of Hawaii, located in the Pacific Ocean.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: Hawaii (  hə-WY-ee; Hawaiian: Hawaiʻi [həˈvɐjʔi, həˈwɐjʔi]) is an island state of the United States, in the Pacific Ocean about 2,000 miles (3,200 km) southwest of the U.S. mainland.

description: capital city of the State of New York, United States, and seat of Albany County
description_wiki: Albany (  AWL-bə-nee) is the capital city of the U.S. state of New York.

Neutrogena Corporation, trading as Neutrogena, is an American company that  produces  cosmetics, skin care and hair care, is owned by parent company Kenvue and is headquartered in Skillman, New Jersey.

description: Austronesian language; native language of the Tagalog ethnic group
description_wiki: Tagalog ( tə-GAH-log, native pronunciation: [tɐˈɡaːloɡ] ; Baybayin: ᜆᜄᜎᜓᜄ᜔) is an Austronesian language spoken as a first language by the ethnic Tagalog people, who make up a quarter of the population of the Philippines, and as a second language by the majority.

surface_forms: Rampart, a neighborhood in Los Angeles, California
Rampart, a lower‐class neighborhood in Los Angeles

description: human settlement in Los Angeles, California, United States of America
description_wiki: Historic Filipinotown (alternately known as HiFi) is a neighborhood in the city of Los Angeles.

aliases: The town of Our Lady the Queen of the Angels of the Little Portion
description: seat of Los Angeles County, and largest city in California, United States
description_wiki: Los Angeles (often referred to by its initials, LA) is the most populous city in the U.S. state of California, and the commercial, financial, and cultural center of Southern California.

aliases: Immaculate Heart High School and Middle School
description: private, Catholic, college preparatory day school in Los Angeles
description_wiki: Immaculate Heart Middle & High School is a private, Catholic, college preparatory day school for girls grades 6-12.

description: city in Los Angeles County, California, United States
description_wiki: Agoura Hills ( ) is a city situated in the Santa Monica Mountains region of Los Angeles County, California, United States.
